questions.text: The height at which the acceleration due to gravity becomes g/9 (where g = the acceleration due to gravity on the surface of the earth) in terms of R, the radius of the earth, is:
questions.subject: Physics

options.explanation: This is the following solution: GM/9R2 ​=GM/(R+h)2 ​3R=R+h h=2R

questions.explanation: This is the following solution: GM/9R2 ​=GM/(R+h)2 ​3R=R+hh=2R
